summary.architecture: Foundation → Coverage → Retention → Prelims → Mains → Interview
strengths: Bot-ready JSON with 15 fields per daily task
Comprehensive ethics framework with 10 thinker profiles
Full interview preparation for 12/24 month plans
AI adaptive architecture with burnout detection
Optional subject integrated in all 48 plans
weaknesses_in_v1_fixed: Static revision → Replaced with spaced repetition
Late ethics integration → Moved to Month 1

risk_factors.risk: Aspirant does not follow the plan consistently
risk_factors.mitigation: Bot reminders + streak system + study partner
Daily newspaper reading system + monthly update

risk_factors.risk: Over-reliance on plan, ignoring test series feedback

risk_factors.mitigation: Guidance note recommending 3-month evaluation before commitment

bot_conversion_readiness.missing: Real-time CA integration requires external API connection

app_conversion_readiness.missing: User preference storage for adaptive personalization needs backend

ai_mentor_readiness.missing: Live model performance data for predictive readiness scoring

summary.final_recommendation: This system is production-ready for deployment in a Telegram bot or mobile app. Immediate next steps: (1) Build Telegram bot with this JSON as backend, (2) Integrate live current affairs API, (3) Deploy competency tracker as interactive dashboard, (4) Add real PYQ database for MCQ practice integration.

comparison_v1_vs_v2.key_upgrades: Phase architecture, optional, essay, ethics, CA engine, revision engine, answer writing, interview, AI architecture, competency model, 24-month plans
